message:
fix: DuckDB compatibility and API refinements across crates

## Store (vc_store/src/lib.rs) ~60 lines
- Fixed audit_events INSERT to manually compute next ID
  (DuckDB doesn't auto-increment INTEGER PRIMARY KEY like SQLite)
- Renamed execute() to execute_simple() for clarity in tests

## Oracle (vc_oracle)
- dna.rs: Enhanced DNA computation (~40 lines)
- evolution.rs: Evolution algorithm improvements (~15 lines)

## Collect (vc_collect)
- executor.rs: Executor enhancements
- machine.rs: Machine detection fix
- probe.rs: Probe improvements
- ssh.rs: SSH additions
- collectors/beads.rs: Removed unused code
- collectors/cloud_bench.rs: Cloud bench additions

## Query (vc_query)
- guardrails.rs: Query guardrail improvements (~11 lines)

## TUI (vc_tui)
- screens/accounts.rs: Minor fix
- screens/beads.rs: Beads screen refactoring (~23 lines)
- screens/rch.rs: RCH screen improvements

## Other
- vc_cli/src/lib.rs: CLI fix
- vc_knowledge/src/lib.rs: Knowledge base additions
- vc_web/src/lib.rs: Web server improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -140,7 +140,7 @@ impl Machine {
             "last_seen_at": self.last_seen_at,
             "last_probe_at": self.last_probe_at,
             "status": self.status.as_str(),
-            "tags": serde_json::Value::Null,
+            "tags": &self.tags,
             "metadata": if metadata.is_null() { serde_json::Value::Null } else { metadata },
             "enabled": self.enabled,
         })
